ValidationRule.description: Field values should not be BLANK if the Quote stage progresses to Pricing Proposal OR OSA, 45102,45897 Validation to MSA, SOW Document Attached fields as part of BIZ-45995,48195 ,47771,48829,50208,61614
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(ISPICKVAL(Quote_Stage__c,'Contract Executed'),NOT(ISPICKVAL(Renewal_Quote_Type__c,'Auto-Renewal')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Deal_Type__c,'Other')), (OR( ISBLANK(OSA_Signature_Date__c), ISBLANK(Booking_Date__c), (ISPICKVAL(Subsidiary__c ,"")), ISBLANK(Bill_To_Account__c), ISBLANK(Bill_To_Address__c), ISBLANK(Ship_To_Account__c), ISBLANK(Ship_To_Address__c), ISBLANK(Invoicing_Contact__c), ISBLANK(Software_Delivery_Contact__c) )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please update the required data (See Guidance for Success) before moving to the next stage.
